name: Weasel Solar Farm And BESS - KCI

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Gamuda + Alternate Path JV. Shares site + 220 kV connection with sister Cellars Hill Wind (also T7 win — data-gap in AURES). Both delivered via Gamuda Engineering EPC. Weasel construction target early 2027; Cellars Hill 2028. Only two Tasmanian T7 projects.

operational_notes: JV between Gamuda Renewables Australia (subsidiary of Malaysian Gamuda Berhad) and Alternate Path (Tasmanian developer). Located Highland Lakes Rd near Bothwell, Central Highlands, ~1hr from Hobart. Shares site + 220 kV connection with sister Cellars Hill Wind Farm (also T7 win — data-gap in AURES). Both delivered via Gamuda Engineering EPC contract. Construction target early 2027 (Weasel first, Cellars Hill 2028). DCCEEW labels as solar only; AURES 'and BESS' scope may reflect a proposed BESS addition beyond CIS T7 scope.

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 7 underwriting awarded (200 MW)
timeline_events.detail: Gamuda Renewables / Alternate Path's Weasel Solar Farm (TAS) wins CIS Tender 7 underwriting. Part of the 19-project / 7.8 GW package announced 2026-05-23.

sources.title: New projects to deliver 7.8 GW of clean energy (DCCEEW)
